select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num , column001 AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE projectState IN (30,31,32) AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY column001

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num , t1.`column001` as officeCode FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '30' AND t2.`fromFlag` = 1 WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t2.`memberCode` IS NOT NULL AND t1.column001 IS NOT NULL AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY t1.column001

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS conditionValue , t3.allnum AS totalValue, t1.`column001` AS officeCode , ROUND(COUNT(*) / allnum *100 ,2) AS specificValue , t4.departmentName AS officeName ,NOW() AS settingTime FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '30' AND t2.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS allnum , column001 AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE projectState IN (30,31,32) AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY column001 ) t3 ON t1.column001 = t3.officeCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department t4 ON t1.column001 = t4.departmentNum WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t2.`memberCode` IS NOT NULL AND t1.column001 IS NOT NULL AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY t1.column001 ORDER BY specificValue DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num , t1.`column001` AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '30' AND t2.`fromFlag` = 1 WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t2.`memberCode` IS NOT NULL AND t1.column001 IS NOT NULL AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY t1.column001

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num , t1.`column001` AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '30' AND t2.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_state t3 ON t1.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t2.`memberCode` IS NOT NULL AND t1.column001 IS NOT NULL AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t3.`projectPlanState` != 40 GROUP BY t1.column001

sqlMap.select: SELECT t.conditionValue , COUNT(*) AS totalValue , ROUND(t.conditionValue /COUNT(*)*100 ,2) AS specificValue , t1.`column001` AS officeCode ,t4.departmentName as officeName,NOW() AS settingTime FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '30' AND t2.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS conditionValue , t1.`column001` AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '30' AND t2.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_state t3 ON t1.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t2.`memberCode` IS NOT NULL AND t1.column001 IS NOT NULL AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t3.`projectPlanState` != 40 GROUP BY t1.column001 ) t ON t1.`column001` = t.officeCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department t4 ON t1.`column001` = t4.`departmentNum` WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t2.`memberCode` IS NOT NULL AND t1.column001 IS NOT NULL AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY t1.column001 ORDER BY specificValue DESC;

SELECT (SUM(projectScore)+SUM(engScore) + SUM(evaluationScore)) /COUNT(*) as avgCloseScore , COUNT(*) AS projectSize , IFNULL(column001, "") as officeCode FROM quality where createdTime > #quarterStartTime#
( ( (column011 != #projectCategory# OR column011 IS NULL)
( column012 != #isALl# OR columno12_readonly != #isALl# )
)
( column012 = #implWay# OR (columno12_readonly = #implWay#) )
)
GROUP BY column001 ORDER BY avgCloseScore DESC

SELECT ROUND((SUM(projectScore)+SUM(engScore) + SUM(evaluationScore)) /COUNT(*),2 )AS specificValue , (SUM(projectScore)+SUM(engScore) + SUM(evaluationScore)) AS conditionValue, COUNT(*) AS totalValue , IFNULL(column001, "") AS officeCode , NOW() AS settingTime , b.`departmentName` AS officeName FROM quality a LEFT JOIN fnd_department b ON a.column001 = b.`departmentNum` WHERE createdTime > #quarterStartTime#
( ( (column011 != #projectCategory# OR column011 IS NULL)
( column012 != #isALl# OR columno12_readonly != #isALl# )
)
( column012 = #implWay# OR (columno12_readonly = #implWay#) )
)
GROUP BY column001 ORDER BY specificValue DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS size , column001 AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE projectCloseTime > #quarterStartTime# AND projectState = 100 AND effectiveTo IS NULL AND column001 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY column001

SELECT COUNT(*) AS size , column001 AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND effectiveTo IS NULL AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND projectState > 20 GROUP BY column001

SELECT t2.conditionValue ,COUNT(*) AS totalValue , ROUND(t2.conditionValue / COUNT(*) *100 ,2) AS specificValue, t.column001 AS officeCode ,t3.`departmentName` AS officeName,NOW() AS settingTime FROM pm_project_header t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS conditionValue ,t1.`column001` AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header t1 WHERE t1.projectCloseTime > #quarterStartTime# AND t1.projectState = 100 AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t1.column001 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.column001 ) t2 ON t.`column001` = t2.officeCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department t3 ON t.`column001` = t3.`departmentNum` AND t3.`status` = 1 WHERE t.createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND t.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t.column001 IS NOT NULL AND t.projectState > 20 GROUP BY t.column001 ORDER BY specificValue DESC;
sqlMap.update: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS implway SELECT CASE WHEN column012 IS NULL AND columno12_readonly != -1 THEN columno12_readonly ELSE column012 END AS ssfs , column001 AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND (column004 LIKE '企业网%' OR column004 LIKE '渠道与商业%');
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS size ,officeCode FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN column012 IS NULL AND columno12_readonly != -1 THEN columno12_readonly ELSE column012 END AS ssfs , column001 AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND (column004 LIKE '企业网%' OR column004 LIKE '渠道与商业%') ) a
WHERE ssfs = #implWay#
GROUP BY officeCode ORDER BY size DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS conditionValue , a.total AS totalValue , ROUND(COUNT(*) / a.total *100 ,2) AS specificValue ,'total' AS officeCode , CONCAT('impl',c.ssfs ) AS dataTypeCode, NOW() AS settingTime ,'全国' AS officeName FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN column012 IS NULL AND columno12_readonly != -1 THEN columno12_readonly ELSE column012 END AS ssfs FROM pm_project_header WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND (column004 LIKE '企业网%' OR column004 LIKE '渠道与商业%') ) c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM pm_project_header WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND (column004 LIKE '企业网%' OR column004 LIKE '渠道与商业%') ) a ON 1=1 GROUP BY c.ssfs UNION SELECT COUNT(*) AS conditionValue ,t.size AS totalValue , ROUND(COUNT(*)/t.size *100 ,2) AS specificValue, c.officeCode ,CONCAT('impl', ssfs) AS dataTypeCode ,NOW() AS settingTime , t2.`departmentName` AS officeName FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN column012 IS NULL AND columno12_readonly != -1 THEN columno12_readonly ELSE column012 END AS ssfs , IFNULL(column001, "") AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND (column004 LIKE '企业网%' OR column004 LIKE '渠道与商业%') ) c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS size ,officeCode FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN column012 IS NULL AND columno12_readonly != -1 THEN columno12_readonly ELSE column012 END AS ssfs , IFNULL(column001, "") AS officeCode FROM pm_project_header WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND createTime > #quarterStartTime# AND column001 IS NOT NULL AND (column004 LIKE '企业网%' OR column004 LIKE '渠道与商业%') ) a GROUP BY a.officeCode ) t ON t.officeCode = c.officeCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department t2 ON c.officeCode = t2.`departmentNum` GROUP BY c.officeCode , c.ssfs

SELECT specificValue,settingTime FROM pm_report_line_data where 1=1
officeCode = #officeCode#
officeCode = 'total'
dataTypeCode = #dataTypeCode#
AND effectiveTo IS NULL ORDER BY settingTime ;

SELECT totalValue,settingTime FROM pm_report_line_data where 1=1
officeCode = #officeCode#
officeCode = 'total'
dataTypeCode = #dataTypeCode#
AND effectiveTo IS NULL ORDER BY settingTime ;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project_header t1 JOIN pm_project_state t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t2.`shipmentState` = -1 AND t1.`column010` = 20;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project_header t1 JOIN pm_project_state t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` WHERE t1.projectState IN (30,31,32) AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t2.`shipmentState` = -1 AND t1.`column010` = 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project_header t1 JOIN pm_project_state t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` WHERE t1.projectState IN (32) AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t2.`shipmentState` = -1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project_header t1 JOIN pm_project_state t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` WHERE t1.projectState IN (32 ,30 ,31 ) AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL AND t2.`shipmentState` = -1 AND t2.`projectPlanState` NOT IN (40,48);
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO pm_report_line_data(dataTypeCode ,officeCode ,conditionValue , totalValue ,specificValue ,settingTime ,createTime , effectiveFrom ) values
( #dataTypeCode# , #list[].officeCode#, #list[].conditionValue#, #list[].totalValue#, #list[].specificValue#, #list[].settingTime#, now(), now() )

INSERT INTO pm_report_line_data(dataTypeCode ,officeCode ,conditionValue , totalValue ,specificValue ,settingTime ,createTime , effectiveFrom ) values
( #list[].dataTypeCode# , #list[].officeCode#, #list[].conditionValue#, #list[].totalValue#, #list[].specificValue#, #list[].settingTime#, now(), now() )
sqlMap.select: SELECT specificValue , CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(settingTime , '%Y-%m')) AS settingTime,dataTypeCode FROM pm_report_line_data WHERE dataTypeCode LIKE 'impl%' AND officeCode = #officeCode# AND effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY dataTypeCode , DATE_FORMAT(settingTime , '%Y-%m');

SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(settingTime , '%Y-%m')) AS settingTime FROM pm_report_line_data WHERE dataTypeCode LIKE 'impl%' AND officeCode = #officeCode# AND effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY dataTypeCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

select ph.*, group_concat(distinct pc.contractNo) as contractNo, fd.`departmentName` as officeName, ps.`shipmentState`, ps.`projectPlanState`, ps.`executionState`, ps.`closeProcessState` from pm_project_header ph left join `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr on ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` left join `pm_project_contract` pc on pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` left join `pm_project_state` ps on ph.`projectId` = ps.`projectId` left join `fnd_department` fd on ph.`column001` = fd.`departmentNum` where ph.effectiveTo IS NULL
ph.column011 = #column011# ph.column004 = #column004#
= !#exceptZQYY#
ph.column001 = #column001# FIND_IN_SET(ph.projectState, #projectState#) FIND_IN_SET(ps.shipmentState, #shipmentState#) FIND_IN_SET(ps.projectPlanState, #projectPlanState#) FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(ps.executionState, ""), #executionState#) FIND_IN_SET(ps.closeProcessState, #closeProcessState#)
( 1 = 1
( 1 = 1
ph.column011 = #querys[].column011# ph.column004 = #querys[].column004#
) = !#querys[].exceptZQYY#
ph.column001 = #querys[].column001# FIND_IN_SET(ph.projectState, #querys[].projectState#) FIND_IN_SET(ps.shipmentState, #querys[].shipmentState#) FIND_IN_SET(ps.projectPlanState, #querys[].projectPlanState#) FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(ps.executionState, ""), #querys[].executionState#) FIND_IN_SET(ps.closeProcessState, #querys[].closeProcessState#) )
group by ph.`projectId`
